subcodes.title: Words to Ida Finch and Fanny and Alma Knobloch, spoken on 1908-11-12
subcodes.first_line: Be not grieved or sorrowful that no great wealth or property has been bestowed upon you. Look at the birds!
subcodes.subjects: @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @moderation; frugality; simplicity, @teaching the Cause; call to teach
